description: User remains stationary while reading the task instructions as they are dynamically revealed on the screen. The cursor is positioned over the browser's tab bar.
frame_description: A dark screen displaying white text instructions that are being typed out word-by-word. A small video feed of the participant is visible in the top right corner.

description: The task instruction text is being progressively revealed on the screen, adding new words in each frame to simulate a typing effect.
frame_description: The central text block updates continuously as the task description 'Imagine you need to book a return domestic flight...' is displayed.
